title: cocculus miersiana
intro: Cocculus miersiana, also known as the Australian Coral Vine, is a plant species native to Australia and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as a treatment for fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and acting as an antispasmodic, which can help alleviate pain and muscle cramps. In herbal preparations, Cocculus miersiana is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
